response.justification: While the candidate possesses over two decades of software engineering experience and a strong background in open-source technologies, they lack the required C1 German proficiency and executive-level team management experience. The role demands a Head of Development with a proven track record in operational leadership, client advisory, and enterprise IT architecture, whereas the candidate's profile is strongly oriented towards an Individual Contributor (Staff/Senior Developer) path.
strengths: Over 20 years of extensive software development experience across multiple stacks and platforms.
Strong background in open-source technologies and Linux environments, aligning with industry needs.
Entrepreneurial experience as a Founder, demonstrating initiative in building and scaling complex platforms.
concerns: German language proficiency is listed as Basic, falling significantly short of the required C1 level.
Lacks a proven track record in executive-level team management and operational leadership.
Missing explicit experience with UML modeling, enterprise IT security, and compliance considerations.
